name: Foil- Roasted Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. With a sharp knife, scoop out the onion centers.
2. Finely chop the centers and measure 1/4 cup.
3. In a small bowl, toss the prepared stuffing mix with the chopped onion and remaining ingredients.
4. Fill each onion cavity with about 2 tablespoons of stuffing.
5. Wrap each onion in heavy-duty foil. Place on a grill, 3 to 4 inches from preheated coals. Roast for approximately 40 minutes or until tender.
Makes 8 servings
Contributor: Mc.Call's No Time to Cook - Bakery Shoppe by Alice
